header.title: Professionals in aluminum products and solutions

s2.title: Key Indicators
texts: Krasnoyarsk Metallurgical Plant is the third largest and youngest of the major processing enterprises in Russia. The main productions are smelting, pressing and forging.

The current production of KraMZ LLC ensures the output of flat and round ingots, extruded profiles, rods and pipes, forgings and stampings from a wide range of aluminum alloys in accordance with the chemical composition of Russian and foreign standards.

stats.label: Among manufacturers of aluminum bridges and infrastructure solutions
Experts in aluminum products and solutions
Mastered nomenclatures of profiles, rods and pipes of various sections

s3.title: Products
s3.subtitle: We create technologies, aluminum products and solutions for the present and the future

byType.title: Rods
byType.desc: We offer extruded round, square, hexagonal, calibrated rods from 8 to 254 mm from various alloys

byType.title: Profiles
byType.desc: We produce aluminum profiles for various purposes: architectural-construction, interior, construction, standard, engineering and according to customer drawings

byType.title: Pipes
byType.desc: KraMZ produces pipes: drawn, extruded, rolled and coil-drawn

byType.title: Strip
byType.desc: KraMZ rolling production is based on a Quarto 500 cold rolling mill and a continuous strip rolling unit

byType.title: Stampings
byType.desc: KraMZ rolled products are represented by plates, GRETS strip, thin and standard strip

solutions.title: Construction
solutions.desc: We offer both ready-made architectural and construction systems and custom solutions for customer needs

solutions.title: Infrastructure
solutions.desc: KraMZ is the first among manufacturers of aluminum bridges and infrastructure solutions

solutions.title: Transport
solutions.desc: KraMZ products are actively used for the production of a wide range of vehicles

solutions.title: Comfortable environment
solutions.desc: The plant produces and supplies products for the improvement of urban and suburban environments

s4.title: Advantages
s4.text: KraMZ is one of the largest manufacturers and engineering centers of aluminum products and solutions in Russia and CIS

stats.title: Инновации и развитие
stats.label: Внедрение современных технологий и постоянная оптимизация производственных процессов.

s5.text: Facilities where KraMZ systems were used during construction

s6.title:
PEOPLE ARE OUR
GREATEST VALUE
s6.text: For KraMZ LLC employees we create safe working conditions, offer one of the best social packages, the opportunity for continuous learning and career growth, development not only in professional activities, but also active participation in the life of the plant and city
